steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes that queen honeybees exceeded the positive‑charge threshold needed to attract stamens.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C says red mason bees can also attract the stamens, which follows because the graph shows their charge meets or exceeds the same threshold.
The other three either claim attraction fails despite higher charge, suggest repulsion with no basis, or assert a specific threshold value not indicated by the data.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
